comment:
\(3^x+\frac{243}{3^x-36}\geq 0\), пусть \(3^x=t\)
$$t+\frac{243}{t-36}\geq 0\Rightarrow \frac{t^2-36t+243}{t-36}\geq 0\Rightarrow \frac{(t-27)(t-9)}{t-36}\geq 0$$
$$\displaystyle \begin{array}{{>{\displaystyle}l}} \left[ \begin{array}{l l} 9\leq t\leq 27\\ t >36 \end{array} \right. \Rightarrow \left[ \begin{array}{l l} 9\leq 3^{x} \leq 27\\ 3^{x} >36 \end{array} \right. \Rightarrow \left[ \begin{array}{l l} 3^{2} \leq 3^{x} \leq 3^{3}\\ 3^{x} >3^{\log_{3} 36} \end{array} \right. \Rightarrow \left[ \begin{array}{l l} 2\leq x\leq 3\\ x >\log_{3} 36 \end{array} \right. \Rightarrow \\ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \Rightarrow x\in [ 2;3] \cup (\log_{3} 36;+\infty ) \end{array}$$
Ответ: \([2;3]\cup (\log_{3} 36;+\infty )\)
